calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-10-2004 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for settlement conference this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR. Diana Padilla.
Arnold Evje, Esq., for Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority, represented by Joreatha Abraham, the property Manager.
Defendant Shirley Stansberry present in pro per.
Parties met in chambers and reached a settlement by stipulation, signed by the parties, but not read into the record, not filed with the clerk.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.
